en.title: Title
en.startselections: Select pieces from the Artwork menu to create lists.
en.notvalidname: It must start with a letter or number and contains only numbers and letters and spaces
en.selectfields: 2. Select what to show on reports
en.downloadData: Download your data as a CSV file
en.downloadImages: Download your images as ZIP file
en.name: Media Name
en.startentering: Start by adding your artwork here
en.startenteringmedia: Start by adding your media here
en.startenteringshow: Start by adding your shows here
en.registrationsuccess: Registration was a success. You should receive shortly an email to confirm your account.
en.registrationalready: Seems like this email is in use, or some error occurred. Please try again.
en.nopage: Looks like this page is not available.
en.operationselections: Choose an action below for your {{sels}} selected artwork.
en.wronglogin: Could not verify your info. Try Again.
en.sendagain: Uhm...I did not receive it yet
en.howtoshows: Keep track of where all your artwork is displaying. Register locations, vernissages and finissages for all your shows.
en.howtoregister: Enter your email, and we will send you a link to confirm registration and set your password. The service is free, and you can enjoy managing and organizing your artwork.
en.passworderror: Uhm...maybe your link has expired. Request another link.
en.successreset: We have sent a reset link to {{email}}. If the email is valid, you should receive a reset link. Please allow a few minutes for the email to arrive
en.resetExplain: Enter your email to receive the reset link.
en.passwordExplain: Type in your new password, and click confirm. If evrything goes well you can login with your new password.
en.termscondition: I agree on the Terms & Conditions
en.typein: Enter an email and a password
en.emailerror: Looks like the email format is wrong
en.tokenexpired: Seems like this URL has expired.
en.registrationsuccessfull: Thank you for registering to Artinventory. Now you can login with your email and the password you set up during registration
en.registerText: Be part of Artinventory community managing, and organizing your artwork with ease
en.welcome: Nice to see you on Artinventory!
en.welcomeText: With Artinventory managing your artworks, creating a work list or organizing your art is easy. Artinventory has already a set of features which makes your work as an artist easier, but we would like to hear from you in order to make it even better. Send us your valuable feedback, whether it is a functionallity issue or a new feature you would like to see.
en.image: Image Selection. Additional images can be uploaded later if required.
en.upload: Click or drop a file to upload
en.feedbacksuccess: Your feedback has been sent. Thank you!
en.explainSelection: To add elements to this list please select them from the artwork page list and then select this list. Do not worry about duplicates, the system will filter them out for you.
en.howtoreport: Select a list and a report, then preview or download directly. If you need a customized report let us know by providing a feedback message.
en.manageCategories: Add, remove or edit your categories
en.manageArttypes: Add, remove or edit your art types
en.manageStatuses: Add, remove or edit your artwork status
en.suredelete: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
en.sureremove: Remove this item from the list?
en.couldnotdelete: The system could not delete the record. Please try again later.
en.couldnotupdate: The system could not update the record. Please try again later.
en.addtolistdescription: Type in a name to create a new list, or select an existing list to add the elements to

explain.profilepersonal: This is your personal area. You can store useful information about you and use them in the reports, or export them as a nice card to share with people
explain.profilework: This is your work area. You can store useful information about your work and use them in the reports, or export them as a nice card to share with people
explain.settingscategories: Links to manage your categories, status and art types to better organize your work.

card.categoryText: Group your artwork into meaningful buckets for better filtering and searching. Use Categories such as Landscapes, Self Portrait or Collages, or Types such as Painting, or Etching, and control the state of your artwork with Status, for example Sold, or Showing in a gallery, or not ready yet.
card.artworkText: Easily create and manage your artwork by entering the details of a piece of art such as its name, dimensions, price and media type. Also categorize and upload images to complete the artwork entry. Use the search and filter options to fast find a artpiece or grop them into selections useful for many extra features.
card.mediaText: Upload here and mange your media files. Upload pictures and list them with their properties such as dimensions and whether they are connected to an artpiece. If you do not need a media file anymore, you can delete it except if it is connected with some of your valuable artpieces.
card.reportText: Create lists by selecting your artwork and use them to group items or to print reports as PDF downloads. There are several PDF report to create and more to come.
